description: Per-read BAM evidence ledger for Q7 existence audit. Not a Tier-2 block — this schema describes the TSV row format stored at <candidate_id>/per_read_evidence/evidence_reads_bam.tsv.gz. The summary counts reach the registry via per_read_evidence_summary.schema.json. One row per (read × evidence_type × bp_side). Produced by STEP_03_per_read_evidence.py.
question: Q7

columns.name: clip_end_template
columns.description: TEMPLATE-frame clipped end — strand-aware. Biologically meaningful for NAHR. Empty for non-clip rows.

columns.name: clip_len_left
columns.description: Length of soft-clip at CIGAR[0], 0 if none.

columns.name: clip_len_right
columns.description: Length of soft-clip at CIGAR[-1], 0 if none.

columns.name: mate_chrom
columns.description: Mate's reference name, or '*' if unmapped.

columns.name: nm
columns.description: NM BAM tag (edit distance), as string.

columns.name: as_score
columns.description: AS BAM tag (BWA alignment score), as string.

columns.name: xs_score
columns.description: XS BAM tag (BWA suboptimal), as string. Empty if absent.

columns.name: sa
columns.description: SA BAM tag — first entry = primary chimeric partner (chr,pos,strand,cigar,mapq,nm). Populated for split_read rows.

columns.name: xa
columns.description: XA BAM tag (BWA alt-positions; repeat signal).

columns.name: is_supplementary
columns.description: True if this row is a supplementary alignment (chimeric half).

columns.name: is_primary_of_pair
columns.description: True for the first mate of a pair seen; enables dedup.
